heading: Prerequisites
body:
To enable vector search using Automated Embedding, you must have the
following:

- `M10` or higher cluster

- A collection with a text field that you want to index for automated
  embeddings.

- One of the following clients:

  - Atlas UI for creating indexes

  - [mongosh](mongodb-shell) for creating indexes and running queries

  - [Node Driver](node) 6.6.0 or higher for creating indexes and running queries

  - [Python Driver](python-drivers) 4.7 or higher for creating indexes and running queries

  Use the following drop-down menu to set the client for the procedures on this page.

  drivers

  **Atlas UI:**

  Atlas UI

  **Shell:**

  MongoDB Shell

  **Nodejs:**

  Node.js

  **Python:**

  Python
